draft_output.text:
To,
The Public Information Officer,
Department of Public Works, Government of Maharashtra.

Subject: Request for information under the Right to Information Act, 2005.

I, Rahul Sharma, a citizen of India, hereby request the following information under Section 6(1) of the RTI Act [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-6]. As per Section 7 of the RTI Act [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-7], the response must be provided within 30 days.

Information Sought:
1. Total expenditure on road construction tenders in Pune district for FY 2024-25.
2. Names of contractors awarded tenders above Rs. 50 lakhs.

Declaration: I am a citizen of India. Fee of Rs. 10 paid via postal order.

Yours faithfully,
Rahul Sharma
Date: 01-06-2026

To,
The Public Information Officer,
Municipal Corporation of Greater Mumbai.

Subject: RTI Application – Building Permits Issued in Ward H-East.

I, Priya Mehta, a citizen of India, under Section 6(1) of the RTI Act [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-6], seek the following information. As per Section 4(1)(b) [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-4], public authorities are obligated to maintain and disclose records.

Information Sought:
1. Total number of building permits issued in Ward H-East in 2025.
2. Names of applicants whose permits were rejected, along with reasons.

Declaration: I am an Indian citizen. A fee of Rs. 10 has been enclosed via IPO.

Signature: Priya Mehta
Date: 02-06-2026

To,
The Public Information Officer,
District Collector's Office, Nashik.

Subject: Request for land records information.

I, Amit Desai, a citizen of India, request the following information under Section 6(1) of the RTI Act [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-6].

Information Sought:
1. Land records for Survey No. 45, Nashik Rural Taluka.
2. Encumbrance or litigation status on the above survey number.

Declaration: I am a citizen of India. A postal order for Rs. 10 is enclosed.

To,
The Public Information Officer,
Department of Education, Government of Rajasthan.

Subject: Request for Teacher Recruitment Data.

I, Sunita Rao, a citizen of India, request information under the RTI Act. The public authority must respond within 30 days of receipt as per the law. Failure to do so will attract a penalty of Rs. 250 per day.

Information Sought:
1. Number of teacher vacancies in government schools for 2025.
2. Selection criteria used for teacher appointments.

Declaration: I am an Indian citizen. Fee of Rs. 10 enclosed.

Signature: Sunita Rao
Date: 03-06-2026

To,
The First Appellate Authority,
Department of Revenue, Government of Gujarat.

Subject: First Appeal under Section 19 of the RTI Act, 2005.

I, Kiran Patel, a citizen of India, file this First Appeal under Section 19(1) of the RTI Act [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-V/S-19] against the order of the PIO who failed to furnish information within 30 days as mandated under Section 7 [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-7].

Information Sought:
1. Status of my RTI Application No. GJ/REV/2026/0045.
2. Reasons for non-disclosure of the requested land survey records.

Declaration: I am a citizen of India. No additional fee is applicable for a first appeal.

Signature: Kiran Patel
Date: 04-06-2026

To,
The Public Information Officer,
Ministry of Finance, Government of India.

Subject: Request for Fiscal Data under RTI.

I, Arjun Singh, a citizen of India, request information under Section 6 of the RTI Act [CITE:RTI-FAKE/S-99].

Information Sought:
1. Total subsidy disbursed under PM Kisan Samman Nidhi in 2025-26.

Declaration: I am an Indian citizen. Rs. 10 fee enclosed.

Signature: Arjun Singh
Date: 04-06-2026

To,
The Public Information Officer,
Department of Health, Government of Kerala.

I, Meera Nair, a citizen of India, request information under Section 6(1) of the RTI Act [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-6].

Information Sought:
1. Number of doctors employed in government hospitals in Thiruvananthapuram district.
2. Status of pending medical equipment procurement tenders above Rs. 1 crore.

Declaration: I am an Indian citizen. Fee of Rs. 10 paid via IPO.

Signature: Meera Nair
Date: 05-06-2026

To,
The Public Information Officer,
Urban Development Authority, Bengaluru.

Subject: RTI Application – Third Party Contracts for Metro Phase 3.

I, Vikram Reddy, a citizen of India, request information under Section 6(1) of the RTI Act [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-6]. As per Section 11 of the RTI Act [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-11], third party information requires notice before disclosure.

Information Sought:
1. Names of contractors for Metro Phase 3 packages.
2. Contract amounts and timelines.

Declaration: I am a citizen of India. Fee of Rs. 10 enclosed via IPO No. 789012.

Signature: Vikram Reddy
Date: 05-06-2026

To,
The Public Information Officer,
Central Board of Direct Taxes, New Delhi.

Subject: RTI Application – Tax Exemption Orders FY 2024-25.

I, Deepa Krishnan, a citizen of India, request information under Section 42 of the RTI Act [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-VII/S-42].

Information Sought:
1. List of entities granted tax exemptions in FY 2024-25.
2. Grounds on which exemptions were granted.

Declaration: I am a citizen of India. Rs. 10 fee enclosed.

Signature: Deepa Krishnan
Date: 06-06-2026

To,
The Public Information Officer,
Panchayati Raj Department, Government of Odisha.

Subject: RTI Application – MGNREGS Work Completion Records.

I, Sushil Mishra, a citizen of India, request information under Section 6(1) of the RTI Act [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-6] and Section 4(1)(b)(xvi) [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-99].

Information Sought:
1. Number of MGNREGS projects completed in Puri district in FY 2025-26.
2. Total person-days generated and funds released.

Declaration: I am an Indian citizen. Fee of Rs. 10 paid via postal order.

Yours faithfully,
Sushil Mishra
Date: 06-06-2026
